mcpServers.description: Adobe App Builder MCP — aio-app-deploy, commerce-event-subscribe, search-commerce-docs, aio-app-dev, aio-app-use, aio-configure-global, aio-dev-invoke, aio-login, aio-where, onboard, upload-chat-history

Playwright browser-automation MCP — drives the EDS site-scraping skills (scrape-reference-site, connect-authenticated-site, refine-visual-match). First use downloads a Chromium binary (~150 MB) cached in ~/Library/Caches/ms-playwright/, shared across all projects.
